chapter_title.en: Chapter on Days and Times Recommended for Travel and Days and Times Disliked for Travel

text: 2391 - وَ رَوَى عَبْدُ اَللَّهِ بْنُ سُلَيْمَانَ عَنْ أَبِي جَعْفَرٍ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ قَالَ : «كَانَ رَسُولُ اَللَّهِ صَلَّى اَللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَ آلِهِ يُسَافِرُ يَوْمَ اَلْخَمِيسِ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2391 - Abdullah ibn Sulayman narrated from Imam Abu Ja'far (as):
"The Messenger of Allah (swt), peace be upon him and his family, used to travel on Thursdays."
